{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elysian virtues
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]]'s [[Incarnation]] manifests [[Elysian virtues]]: honest, compassionate, wise, patient, valiant, loyal, merciful, and diligent.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian virtues]] would not allow [[Alin]] to attack his new allies.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Religion and cults]]
